name: outlook
description: Read, send, schedule, and manage Outlook mail and calendars

envVars.name: MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Microsoft Azure App Client ID (Application ID)

tools.name: List Emails
tools.description: List recent emails from inbox or a specific folder

folderId.description: Mail folder ID or well-known folder name

historicalSummary.omitted: large email bodies and provider-specific message fields

tools.name: Get Email
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific email

tools.name: Send Email
tools.description: Send a new email message

message.description: Microsoft Graph message object with subject, body, toRecipients, and optional fields

saveToSentItems.description: Save sent message to Sent Items

tools.name: Search Emails
tools.description: Search emails by query, subject, sender, or date

query.description: Microsoft Graph message search query. Gmail-style AQS terms such as from:marcus or subject:Finanzplan are accepted; the runtime quotes them for Graph $search.

historicalSummary.omitted: large email bodies and provider-specific message fields

tools.name: List Folders
tools.description: List all mail folders in the mailbox

historicalSummary.omitted: folder provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Folder
tools.description: Get metadata for a mail folder

folderId.description: Mail folder ID or well-known folder name

tools.name: Create Folder
tools.description: Create a mail folder

tools.name: Update Folder
tools.description: Rename a mail folder

tools.name: Delete Folder
tools.description: Delete a mail folder

tools.name: Mark Email Read
tools.description: Mark an email as read

tools.name: Mark Email Unread
tools.description: Mark an email as unread

tools.name: Delete Email
tools.description: Delete an email message

tools.name: Move Email
tools.description: Move an email to another folder

destinationId.description: Destination folder ID or well-known folder name

tools.name: Archive Email
tools.description: Move an email to the archive folder

destinationId.description: Destination folder ID or well-known folder name

tools.name: Flag Email
tools.description: Set a follow-up flag on an email

tools.name: Clear Email Flag
tools.description: Clear the follow-up flag on an email

tools.name: Categorize Email
tools.description: Replace the categories on an email

tools.name: List Categories
tools.description: List Outlook master categories

historicalSummary.omitted: category provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Create Category
tools.description: Create an Outlook master category

tools.name: Update Category
tools.description: Update an Outlook master category color

tools.name: Delete Category
tools.description: Delete an Outlook master category

tools.name: Create Draft
tools.description: Create a draft email message

body.description: Microsoft Graph itemBody object, for example { contentType, content }

importance.description: Message importance: low, normal, or high

tools.description: List draft email messages

tools.description: Get a draft message

tools.description: Update a draft email message

body.description: Microsoft Graph itemBody object, for example { contentType, content }

importance.description: Message importance: low, normal, or high

tools.name: Send Draft
tools.description: Send a draft email message

tools.name: Delete Draft
tools.description: Delete a draft email message

tools.description: Reply to an email

tools.description: Reply all to an email

tools.description: Forward an email

tools.description: Create a reply draft for an email

tools.description: Create a reply-all draft for an email

tools.description: Create a forward draft for an email

tools.name: List Attachments
tools.description: List attachments for an email message

historicalSummary.omitted: attachment binary content and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Attachment
tools.description: Get metadata and content for an email attachment

tools.name: Add Attachment To Message
tools.description: Add a small attachment to a draft message

tools.name: List Conversation Messages
tools.description: List messages in an Outlook conversation

historicalSummary.omitted: large email bodies and provider-specific message fields

tools.name: List Threads
tools.description: List recent Outlook conversation threads for request-desk triage. Returns one representative message per conversationId; pass that value as thread_id to the template outlook-get-thread tool or use it in get_thread's filter.

folderId.description: Mail folder ID or well-known folder name

$top.description: Maximum recent messages to inspect as thread representatives

$filter.description: Optional OData filter expression, e.g. isRead eq false

historicalSummary.omitted: large email bodies and provider-specific message fields

tools.name: Get Thread
tools.description: Get Outlook messages in a conversation. Pass a Microsoft Graph OData filter such as conversationId eq 'AAQk...'.

filter.description: Microsoft Graph OData filter, for example conversationId eq 'AAQk...'. Escape embedded single quotes by doubling them.

tools.name: List Shared Mailbox Emails
tools.description: List messages from a shared or delegated mailbox that the signed-in Microsoft account can access

mailbox.description: Mailbox user principal name or Microsoft Graph user ID

folderId.description: Mail folder ID or well-known folder name

historicalSummary.omitted: large email bodies and provider-specific message fields

tools.name: Search Shared Mailbox Emails
tools.description: Search messages in a shared or delegated mailbox that the signed-in Microsoft account can access

mailbox.description: Mailbox user principal name or Microsoft Graph user ID

query.description: Microsoft Graph message search query. The runtime quotes the query for Graph $search.

historicalSummary.omitted: large email bodies and provider-specific message fields

tools.description: Find a Microsoft 365 group by primary email address before reading its group inbox threads

tools.description: List Microsoft 365 group inbox conversation threads

tools.description: List posts from a Microsoft 365 group inbox conversation thread

tools.description: Create an Outlook calendar event

body.description: Microsoft Graph itemBody object, for example { contentType, content }

start.description: Start date/time object with dateTime and timeZone

end.description: End date/time object with dateTime and timeZone

importance.description: Event importance: low, normal, or high

showAs.description: Free/busy status such as free, busy, tentative, or oof

isOnlineMeeting.description: Whether to create an online meeting

onlineMeetingProvider.description: Online meeting provider such as teamsForBusiness

end.description: End date/time object with dateTime and timeZone

prompts.title: Check my emails
prompts.prompt: List my recent unread emails and summarize the most important ones.

prompts.title: Search my emails
prompts.prompt: Search my emails for specific topics, senders, or date ranges.

prompts.title: Draft an email
prompts.prompt: Help me draft a professional email with proper formatting and tone.
